blockingIssues.description: `register_filtered_input_sources()` still guesses source identity when a filtered rewrite is emitted as a fresh replacement item after sibling drops/reorders, so sent-state can still drift and replay an already-delivered server-conversation delta later.

appliedUpdates.description: Added `.factory/library/openai-filtered-input-provenance.md` documenting the Rust/JS filtered-input provenance mismatch (`ModelInputData` lacks JS-style `sourceItems`/`filterApplied`) behind recurring server-conversation sent-state bugs.
